top_categories.workout_context: 60ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Race-pace efforts that mimic GranFondo Banff's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before August.
At mile 60 of 88, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
GranFondo Banff's Paved highway, Canadian Rockies mountain roads forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 88 miles.
At GranFondo Banff, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of GranFondo Banff. Train it until it feels boring.
5,249ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 88 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
5,249ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
Two threshold sessions per week without the recovery cost of VO2max work. For 88 miles, sustainable FTP gains matter more than peak power.
Endurance with intensity spikes baked in. Exactly what 5,249ft of climbing on paved mountain highway through Banff National Park does to your power file on race day.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At GranFondo Banff, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.

race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for GranFondo Banff’s 88 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.altitude: Moderate altitude at GranFondo Banff. Arrive 2–3 days early. Reduce intensity expectations by 5–10%. Hydrate aggressively.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at GranFondo Banff requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on paved mountain highway through banff national park to build confidence. Expect: paved highway, canadian rockies mountain roads, national park roads.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on TT Threshold, Race Simulation, and Durability to prepare you for 88 miles of paved mountain highway through banff national park in Banff, Alberta, Canada.
